summary: Bug fix verification complete for Fin & Feathers menu image issues. ALL TESTS PASSED. Both reported bugs have been confirmed as FIXED.
critical_code_review_comments: FIX VERIFIED: MenuCard.jsx (Line 49-53) correctly resolves image URLs by prepending REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL for /api/ paths
FIX VERIFIED: MenuPage.jsx (Line 755) edit modal now uses 'image' field instead of 'image_url'
FIX VERIFIED: ImageUploader.jsx (Line 130) returns relative path from upload
FIX VERIFIED: MenuItemsTab.jsx (Line 124) stores relative paths instead of full URLs
FIX VERIFIED: MenuImageEditor.jsx (Line 195-207) stores relative paths
FIX VERIFIED: All 14 menu items that had old deployment URLs have been converted to relative /api/media/ paths

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All images loading correctly on public menu)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing menu items for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Menu image bugs verified fixed. Catfish Nuggets and Chicken Tenders & Fries both display correct images. Admin edit functionality works correctly - changes persist to public menu. All /api/media/ paths resolve properly.

Bug 1: Catfish Nuggets wrong/broken imag.details: Image now correctly loads from /api/media/a2ed5fd0-2fba-4603-8222-2197edeb8652 (HTTP 200, 830KB image)

Bug 2: Chicken Tenders & Fries wrong/bro.details: Image now correctly loads from /api/media/2078524c-e215-45e3-b2c2-992ef19e0e3a (HTTP 200, 1MB image)

Bug 3: Admin menu edits not updating pub.details: Admin PUT endpoint correctly accepts 'image' field and changes reflect on public menu immediately

All starters have images.details: All 9 starter items have valid images that load correctly

/api/media/ paths load correctly.details: Images served via /api/media/ endpoint return HTTP 200 with correct content-type

Admin can login and access Menu Items.details: Admin panel at /admin accepts credentials admin/$outhcentral

MenuImageEditor modal works.details: Image crop/zoom/upload modal opens correctly from admin Menu Items tab

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause_1: 14 menu items had images pointing to old deployment URL (location-menu-app.preview.emergentagent.com) instead of relative /api/media/ paths - FIXED by converting to relative paths
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause_2: Admin edit modal in MenuPage.jsx used 'image_url' field but backend PUT endpoint only accepts 'image' - FIXED by using 'image' field
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause_3: ImageUploader, MenuItemsTab, and MenuImageEditor were storing full absolute URLs instead of relative paths - FIXED to store relative paths
